languages.text: {n}Рассмотрев вас внимательнее, Изимонд чуть оживляется.{/n} "Значит, это вас род Гапрак направил на подмогу Себериану. Разведчики докладывали, что ваша рота была уничтожена на подходе к резиденции. Это печально, но несущественно — семейство Гапрак славится своими {g|Encyclopedia:PsykerGlossary}псайкерами{/g} и {g|Encyclopedia:AstropathGlossary}астропатами{/g}, поэтому наверняка знает о вашем спасении. В скором времени будут снаряжены новые войска".

traits.locale_text: {n}Рассмотрев вас внимательнее, Изимонд чуть оживляется.{/n} "Значит, это вас род Гапрак направил на подмогу Себериану. Разведчики докладывали, что ваша рота была уничтожена на подходе к резиденции. Это печально, но несущественно — семейство Гапрак славится своими {g|Encyclopedia:PsykerGlossary}псайкерами{/g} и {g|Encyclopedia:AstropathGlossary}астропатами{/g}, поэтому наверняка знает о вашем спасении. В скором времени будут снаряжены новые войска".

languages.text: {n}After examining you more closely, Sauerback's eye brightens with interest.{/n} "So you're the one House Gaprak sent to Seberian's aid. The scouts reported your company was destroyed on the approach to the residence. A regrettable incident, but nothing to worry about — the Gapraks are famous for their {g|Encyclopedia:PsykerGlossary}psykers{/g} and {g|Encyclopedia:AstropathGlossary}Astropaths{/g}, so they must know you survived. New troops will be dispatched shortly."

В скором времени будут снаряжены новые войска".

New troops will be dispatched shortly."

A regrettable incident, but nothing to worry about — the Gapraks are famous for their psykers and Astropaths, so they must know you survived. New troops will be dispatched shortly."

{n}After examining you more closely, Sauerback's eye brightens with interest.{/n} "So you're the one House Gaprak sent to Seberian's aid. The scouts reported your company was destroyed on the approach to the residence. A regrettable incident, but nothing to worry about — the Gapraks are famous for their psykers and Astropaths, so they must know you survived. New troops will be dispatched shortly."

languages.text: {n}Tras examinarte en detalle, el ojo de Sauerback reluce con interés.{/n} «Conque usted es {mf|el|la} enviad{mf|o|a} de la casa Gaprak para apoyar a Seberian. Los exploradores informaron de que su compañía fue destruida al acercarse a la residencia. Un incidente lamentable, pero no muy preocupante: los Gaprak son famosos por sus {g|Encyclopedia:PsykerGlossary}psíquicos{/g} y {g|Encyclopedia:AstropathGlossary}Astrópatas{/g}, por lo que deben ser conscientes de que usted ha sobrevivido. Pronto llegarán nuevas tropas».
languages.original_text: {n}After examining you more closely, Sauerback's eye brightens with interest.{/n} "So you're the one House Gaprak sent to Seberian's aid. The scouts reported your company was destroyed on the approach to the residence. A regrettable incident, but nothing to worry about — the Gapraks are famous for their {g|Encyclopedia:PsykerGlossary}psykers{/g} and {g|Encyclopedia:AstropathGlossary}Astropaths{/g}, so they must know you survived. New troops will be dispatched shortly."

traits.locale_text: {n}Tras examinarte en detalle, el ojo de Sauerback reluce con interés.{/n} «Conque usted es {mf|el|la} enviad{mf|o|a} de la casa Gaprak para apoyar a Seberian. Los exploradores informaron de que su compañía fue destruida al acercarse a la residencia. Un incidente lamentable, pero no muy preocupante: los Gaprak son famosos por sus {g|Encyclopedia:PsykerGlossary}psíquicos{/g} y {g|Encyclopedia:AstropathGlossary}Astrópatas{/g}, por lo que deben ser conscientes de que usted ha sobrevivido. Pronto llegarán nuevas tropas».

languages.text: {n}仔细打量过你后，伊西蒙德·苏尔贝克眼中亮起了兴致。{/n}“这么说，你就是贾帕克家族派来支援塞贝里安的人了。侦察兵报告说，你们连队在靠近宅邸时全军覆没了。真遗憾，不过也没什么好担心的——贾帕克家族以其{g|Encyclopedia:PsykerGlossary}灵能者{/g}和{g|Encyclopedia:AstropathGlossary}星语者{/g}而称名，所以他们肯定知道你还活着，新部队马上就会派来。”
languages.original_text: {n}After examining you more closely, Sauerback's eye brightens with interest.{/n} "So you're the one House Gaprak sent to Seberian's aid. The scouts reported your company was destroyed on the approach to the residence. A regrettable incident, but nothing to worry about — the Gapraks are famous for their {g|Encyclopedia:PsykerGlossary}psykers{/g} and {g|Encyclopedia:AstropathGlossary}Astropaths{/g}, so they must know you survived. New troops will be dispatched shortly."

traits.locale_text: {n}仔细打量过你后，伊西蒙德·苏尔贝克眼中亮起了兴致。{/n}“这么说，你就是贾帕克家族派来支援塞贝里安的人了。侦察兵报告说，你们连队在靠近宅邸时全军覆没了。真遗憾，不过也没什么好担心的——贾帕克家族以其{g|Encyclopedia:PsykerGlossary}灵能者{/g}和{g|Encyclopedia:AstropathGlossary}星语者{/g}而称名，所以他们肯定知道你还活着，新部队马上就会派来。”

languages.text: {n}Après vous avoir {mf|observé|observée} de plus près, une lueur d'intérêt illumine le regard de Sauerback.{/n} « C'est donc vous que la maison Gaprak a {mf|envoyé|envoyée} au secours de Seberian ? Les éclaireurs nous ont informés que votre compagnie avait été anéantie à proximité de la résidence. Un regrettable incident, mais pas de quoi s'inquiéter pour autant. Les Gaprak étant célèbres pour leurs {g|Encyclopedia:PsykerGlossary}psykers{/g} et {g|Encyclopedia:AstropathGlossary}astropathes{/g}, ils savent sans doute que vous avez survécu. De nouvelles troupes seront dépêchées prochainement. »
languages.original_text: {n}After examining you more closely, Sauerback's eye brightens with interest.{/n} "So you're the one House Gaprak sent to Seberian's aid. The scouts reported your company was destroyed on the approach to the residence. A regrettable incident, but nothing to worry about — the Gapraks are famous for their {g|Encyclopedia:PsykerGlossary}psykers{/g} and {g|Encyclopedia:AstropathGlossary}Astropaths{/g}, so they must know you survived. New troops will be dispatched shortly."

traits.locale_text: {n}Après vous avoir {mf|observé|observée} de plus près, une lueur d'intérêt illumine le regard de Sauerback.{/n} « C'est donc vous que la maison Gaprak a {mf|envoyé|envoyée} au secours de Seberian ? Les éclaireurs nous ont informés que votre compagnie avait été anéantie à proximité de la résidence. Un regrettable incident, mais pas de quoi s'inquiéter pour autant. Les Gaprak étant célèbres pour leurs {g|Encyclopedia:PsykerGlossary}psykers{/g} et {g|Encyclopedia:AstropathGlossary}astropathes{/g}, ils savent sans doute que vous avez survécu. De nouvelles troupes seront dépêchées prochainement. »

languages.text: {n}Seni daha yakından inceledikten sonra Sauerback'in gözü ilgiyle parlıyor.{/n} "Demek Gaprak Hanesi'nin Seberian'ın yardımına gönderdiği kişi sizsiniz. İzciler, bölüğünüzün saraya yaklaşırken yok edildiğini bildirdi. Üzücü bir olay olsa da endişelenecek bir şey yok. Gapraklar, {g|Encyclopedia:PsykerGlossary}ruhsezerleri{/g} ve {g|Encyclopedia:AstropathGlossary}Astropatlarıyla{/g} ünlüdür. Bu yüzden hayatta kaldığınızı biliyor olmalılar. Kısa süre içinde yeni birlikler gönderilecektir."
languages.original_text: {n}After examining you more closely, Sauerback's eye brightens with interest.{/n} "So you're the one House Gaprak sent to Seberian's aid. The scouts reported your company was destroyed on the approach to the residence. A regrettable incident, but nothing to worry about — the Gapraks are famous for their {g|Encyclopedia:PsykerGlossary}psykers{/g} and {g|Encyclopedia:AstropathGlossary}Astropaths{/g}, so they must know you survived. New troops will be dispatched shortly."

traits.locale_text: {n}Seni daha yakından inceledikten sonra Sauerback'in gözü ilgiyle parlıyor.{/n} "Demek Gaprak Hanesi'nin Seberian'ın yardımına gönderdiği kişi sizsiniz. İzciler, bölüğünüzün saraya yaklaşırken yok edildiğini bildirdi. Üzücü bir olay olsa da endişelenecek bir şey yok. Gapraklar, {g|Encyclopedia:PsykerGlossary}ruhsezerleri{/g} ve {g|Encyclopedia:AstropathGlossary}Astropatlarıyla{/g} ünlüdür. Bu yüzden hayatta kaldığınızı biliyor olmalılar. Kısa süre içinde yeni birlikler gönderilecektir."

languages.text: {n}Nachdem er dich genauer betrachtet hat, weiten sich Sauerbacks Augen interessiert.{/n} "Euch hat Haus Gaprak also geschickt, um Seberian zu helfen. Den Spähern zufolge wurde Eure Kompanie auf dem Weg zur Residenz vernichtet. Ein bedauerlicher Zwischenfall, aber kein Grund zur Sorge ... die Gapraks sind berühmt für ihre {g|Encyclopedia:PsykerGlossary}Psioniker{/g} und {g|Encyclopedia:AstropathGlossary}Astropathen{/g}. Sie werden also wissen, dass Ihr überlebt habt. In Kürze werden neue Truppen entsandt."
languages.original_text: {n}After examining you more closely, Sauerback's eye brightens with interest.{/n} "So you're the one House Gaprak sent to Seberian's aid. The scouts reported your company was destroyed on the approach to the residence. A regrettable incident, but nothing to worry about — the Gapraks are famous for their {g|Encyclopedia:PsykerGlossary}psykers{/g} and {g|Encyclopedia:AstropathGlossary}Astropaths{/g}, so they must know you survived. New troops will be dispatched shortly."

traits.locale_text: {n}Nachdem er dich genauer betrachtet hat, weiten sich Sauerbacks Augen interessiert.{/n} "Euch hat Haus Gaprak also geschickt, um Seberian zu helfen. Den Spähern zufolge wurde Eure Kompanie auf dem Weg zur Residenz vernichtet. Ein bedauerlicher Zwischenfall, aber kein Grund zur Sorge ... die Gapraks sind berühmt für ihre {g|Encyclopedia:PsykerGlossary}Psioniker{/g} und {g|Encyclopedia:AstropathGlossary}Astropathen{/g}. Sie werden also wissen, dass Ihr überlebt habt. In Kürze werden neue Truppen entsandt."

languages.text: {n}サウアーバックはあなたをより詳しく調べ、興味を示すように目を輝かせた。{/n}「そう、あなたはハウス・ガプラクがシベリアンの救援に派遣した者ですね。偵察隊は、あなたの部隊が邸宅への接近中に壊滅したと報告していました。残念な出来事ですが、心配する必要はありません。ガプラク家は有名な{g|Encyclopedia:PsykerGlossary}サイカー{/g}と{g|Encyclopedia:AstropathGlossary}アストロパスの{/g}家柄ですから、あなたが生き延びたことを知っているはずです。すぐに新兵が派遣されます。」
languages.original_text: {n}After examining you more closely, Sauerback's eye brightens with interest.{/n} "So you're the one House Gaprak sent to Seberian's aid. The scouts reported your company was destroyed on the approach to the residence. A regrettable incident, but nothing to worry about — the Gapraks are famous for their {g|Encyclopedia:PsykerGlossary}psykers{/g} and {g|Encyclopedia:AstropathGlossary}Astropaths{/g}, so they must know you survived. New troops will be dispatched shortly."

traits.locale_text: {n}サウアーバックはあなたをより詳しく調べ、興味を示すように目を輝かせた。{/n}「そう、あなたはハウス・ガプラクがシベリアンの救援に派遣した者ですね。偵察隊は、あなたの部隊が邸宅への接近中に壊滅したと報告していました。残念な出来事ですが、心配する必要はありません。ガプラク家は有名な{g|Encyclopedia:PsykerGlossary}サイカー{/g}と{g|Encyclopedia:AstropathGlossary}アストロパスの{/g}家柄ですから、あなたが生き延びたことを知っているはずです。すぐに新兵が派遣されます。」
